title: Join
heading: Manitoba Fiddle Association Membership
bodyHtml:
Manitoba Fiddle Association Membership

As a member of the Manitoba Fiddle Association you not only gain some benefits for yourself, but by becoming a part of the association you are doing your share to help promote fiddling in Manitoba. To join the organization please print the application form provided below and follow the instructions listed on the document.
application_mbfiddleassoc_2024v3_fin.pdf
File Size: 154 kb
File Type: pdf
Download File
Some of the personal benefits include:
  1. You receive the MFA Newsletter which allows you to keep up-to-date on what is happening on the fiddling scene in Manitoba.
  2. You can vote at the annual general meeting.
  3. You have the opportunity to nominate inductees into the Wall of Fame.
  4. You are welcome to get involved with MFA activities and become part of a friendly, enthusiastic, dynamic team.

Some of the Activities the MFA are currently involved in or planning and which members can become involved:
  • Promotion of a summer fiddle camp.
  • Setting up criteria for selecting nominees for the Wall of Fame
  • Organizing the Manitoba Fiddle Championships
  • Producing a quarterly newsletter.
  • Planning the next inductee ceremony.
  • Organizing some kind of fundraiser for the association.
  • Setting up a membership drive.
  • Interviewing both senior and junior fiddlers to be featured in our newsletter.
  • Writing articles for the newsletter.
